display.purpose: Page-level heroes only. One per screen maximum.

headline.purpose: Major section titles. Project names, overview headings.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel headers, toolbar labels. The workhorse heading level.

body.purpose: Descriptions, form labels, table cell text. 65-75ch line length cap.

label.purpose: Metadata, badges, input labels, secondary navigation.

mono.purpose: Scan values, coordinates, file paths, technical identifiers.

shadows.name: ambient-sm
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus, popovers. Float above parent panel.

shadows.name: ambient-md
shadows.purpose: Modals and dialogs. Clear floating separation.

shadows.name: glow-primary
shadows.purpose: Semantic glow on primary button hover/focus.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Elements entering view. Deceleration into resting state.

motion.name: ease-in
motion.purpose: Elements leaving view. Acceleration away from resting state.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: State changes: hover, focus, active, toggle.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Layout shifts: panel open/close, content swap.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Page-level transitions: route change fade, modal entrance.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The sole element that wears Forge Blue as a fill. For primary actions and confirmations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3b82f6; color: #f3f3f4; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px 20px; height: 40px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #60a5fa; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #2563eb; transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Glass-effect button for secondary actions on elevated surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(30, 35, 49, 0.85); color: #c2c3c6; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px 20px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(30, 35, 49, 1); color: #f3f3f4; border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: rgba(26, 35, 50, 0.95); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button for toolbar actions and low-emphasis operations.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg> Download</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #c2c3c6; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px 20px; height: 40px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); color: #f3f3f4; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action confirmation. Restricted to delete/remove confirmations.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #ef4444; color: #f3f3f4; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 10px 20px; height: 40px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #f87171; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ef4444; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-danger:active { background: #dc2626; transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Primary container for content sections. Glass effect for floating over variable backgrounds.
components.html:
Scan Results

4 indications detected across 12 scan zones.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.85); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #f3f3f4; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { } .ds-card-text { font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: #c2c3c6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input with glass background and focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #c2c3c6; } .ds-input { background: rgba(30, 35, 45, 0.65); color: #f3f3f4; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; padding: 10px 14px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #616369; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3b82f6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(100, 150, 255, 0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status indicator. Tinted background with full-chroma text.
components.html: ActiveApprovedExpiringExpired
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-primary { background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15); color: #60a5fa; } .ds-badge-success { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15); color: #22c55e; } .ds-badge-warning { background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.15); color: #f97316; } .ds-badge-danger { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15); color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Horizontal top navigation with active underline indicator.
components.html: ProjectsPersonnelDocumentsTools
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; height: 64px; padding: 0 24px; background: rgba(18, 24, 37, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06); } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; font-family: Outfit, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #c2c3c6; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #f3f3f4; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); } .ds-nav-active { color: #f3f3f4; } .ds-nav-active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -8px; left: 16px; right: 16px; height: 2px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 1px; }

narrative.overview:
Matrix Portal is where raw scan data gets shaped into actionable inspection reports. The visual system reflects this: dark, purposeful, instrument-grade. Every surface exists to present the user's work (scans, 3D models, certification data, reports) with zero decorative overhead. The interface recedes; the data advances.

The aesthetic descends from professional creative tools like DaVinci Resolve, not from SaaS dashboards or admin templates. Density is a feature, not a problem to solve. Controls are reachable without hunting. Hierarchy is communicated through tonal layering, weight contrast, and deliberate spacing rhythm, never through ornament.

This system explicitly rejects: generic AI-generated layouts, Bootstrap/Material admin aesthetics, legacy NDT software clutter, and playful SaaS patterns. If a prospective licensee can't tell this was purpose-built for NDT professionals, the design has failed.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal dark surfaces with blue-tinted neutrals; no pure black, no pure white
Tactile, precise components with clear state feedback
Information-dense layouts where the work dominates the viewport
Restrained color strategy: blue accent on less than 10% of surface area
Monospaced data, proportional prose; font choice signals content type

rules.name: The Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Forge Blue appears on no more than 10% of any screen's surface area. It marks interactive affordances and active selections. The moment it's spread across backgrounds, headers, or decorative elements, it stops meaning anything.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No neutral in the system is achromatic. Every gray carries a blue undertone (chroma 0.005-0.01 in OKLCH). This prevents the cold, sterile feeling of pure gray while maintaining the professional darkness the forge demands.

rules.name: The Weight Gap Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy levels maintain at least a 1.25x size ratio and a visible weight contrast. 600 next to 400 reads as hierarchy. 500 next to 400 reads as mush.

rules.name: The Font Signals Content Rule
rules.body: Proportional type (Outfit) is for prose and interface labels. Monospaced type (JetBrains Mono) is for data, measurements, and technical values. Mixing them within the same element is forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The tonal step between Forge Dark and Forge Surface is all the depth they need. Shadows appear only as a response to state or when a floating element must detach from the page plane.

dos: Do use tonal surface stepping (Dark → Surface → Panel → Overlay) to establish depth. Four levels is the maximum.
Do restrict Forge Blue to interactive affordances and active states. Under 10% surface area is the target.
Do use semantic colors exclusively at the point of status. A badge, an icon, an inline indicator.
Do set body text to 65-75ch maximum line length.
Do use JetBrains Mono for any value the user might copy or compare.
Do maintain the 8px spacing base. Every margin and padding should resolve to a multiple of 4px or 8px.
Do use 150ms ease-out transitions for state changes.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent).
Don't apply glassmorphism as a default surface treatment.
Don't build the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't create identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text repeated).
Don't reach for a modal as the first solution.
Don't use bounce, elastic, or spring animations.
Don't use raw rgba() or hex values in component code. Reference design tokens.
Don't produce anything that looks like a Bootstrap admin panel, a Material Design template, or legacy NDT software.
Don't add purely decorative elements: background patterns, floating shapes, gradient blobs, ornamental dividers.
